title: Cirrus: Update VM images
body:
These were produced as an intended byproduct of:
https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/3754

Where 'systemd_banish.sh' was run during base-image production.
Therefor, during run-time there should no longer be interference
of testing by background/periodic processes.

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body: Sorry @rhatdan this is a bit late, it only just occurred to me last night while staring at the ceiling and not sleeping :confounded:
@cevich Do we need similar for containers/storage?
@rhatdan Similar in c/storage is this one: https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/415
#415 sees to be having same test problem as #408 :cry:

:pushpin: Commit 4ecb129 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 4ecb129f896601edfc62448d7c52d9521fd1cd57 -->
Forcing merge to fix other PRs.
